channel.title: Ethan's Recsys Learning
channel.description: Personal feed for English shadowing - recsys MLE talks + BQ Q&A by topic
channel.itunes:author: Ethan Bai

item.title: 开场 · Opening (Tell me about yourself / Why / Why move)
item.description: 开场必问三题:自我介绍、Why(YouTube 版)、Why make a move。面试官提问(onyx)→ 2 秒留白 → 英文范答(nova)。gpt-4o-mini-tts 自然语音。
item.itunes:author: Ethan Bai (gpt-4o-mini-tts · onyx Q + nova A)

item.title: Netflix's Big Bet: One Model to Rule Recommendations
item.description: Yesu Feng (Netflix) on building a foundation model for personalization. AI Engineer World's Fair 2025. ~22 min. [Audio volume +30%]
item.itunes:author: Yesu Feng, Netflix
